title: Trait
description: A permanent character trait affecting attributes, skill progression, or behaviour.

tags.description: Classification tags: physical, mental, social, positive, negative, neutral.

attribute_modifiers.description: Attribute ID → flat integer modifier added to the base attribute.

skill_xp_multipliers.description: Skill ID → XP gain multiplier (1.0 = normal; 1.1 = 10% faster).

flags.description: Behaviour flags checked by simulation systems (e.g. 'combat_morale_penalty').

conflicts.description: Trait IDs that cannot coexist with this trait.
